summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the Discussion Section redesign on the AFTER tab of the Lesson Detail page. All 13 features tested successfully. The accordion-style prompt flow is working correctly with expandable cards, reply forms, moderation controls, and proper data-testid attributes.
passed_tests: Discussion section renders with 'DISCUSSION QUESTIONS' heading on AFTER tab
Each prompt displays as expandable card with numbered circle (1, 2) and question text
Clicking a prompt card expands it to show reply form and existing replies
Clicking an expanded prompt collapses it back, showing response count
Only one prompt can be expanded at a time (accordion behavior verified - 1 reply input visible)
Reply form appears inside expanded prompt with textarea and circular send button
Submitting a reply adds it to the replies list with 'Response submitted!' toast
Replies show avatar (initials), name, relative time, and content
Moderation controls (status dropdown, pin, delete) visible on hover for admin
Status dropdown shows Pending/Answered/Follow-up options and updates correctly
Empty state shows 'Be the first to share your thoughts.' when no replies exist
Collapsed prompt shows response count (e.g. '1 response', '2 responses')
data-testid='discussion-section' present and working
data-testid='prompt-card-0' present and working
data-testid='prompt-card-1' present and working
data-testid='prompt-tab-0' present and working
data-testid='prompt-tab-1' present and working
data-testid='reply-input' present and working
data-testid='submit-reply-btn' present and working
Chevron icon rotates when prompt is expanded (pointing down) vs collapsed (pointing right)
First prompt expands by default on page load
Reply input has 'Share your thoughts...' placeholder
Circular send button is disabled when textarea is empty
critical_code_review_comments: Discussion section correctly implements accordion behavior with only one prompt expanded at a time
Reply form correctly submits and updates the replies list in real-time
Moderation controls (status, pin, delete) are icon-only and appear on hover as designed
Status dropdown correctly shows all three options (Pending, Answered, Follow-up) with icons
Empty state message is user-friendly and centered
Response count updates correctly when replies are added
All required data-testid attributes are present for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test reply during testing: 'Test reply from automated testing - 52401.848331867'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discussion section redesign fully tested. Key data-testid values: discussion-section, prompt-card-0, prompt-card-1, prompt-tab-0, prompt-tab-1, reply-input, submit-reply-btn, status-btn-{replyId}, reply-{replyId}. The lesson used for testing: /lessons/f76ba67f-d0ac-47ff-ae75-a2b8c46dec9e (The Good News). Prompt 1 has 2 responses, Prompt 2 has 0 responses. Moderation controls appear on hover over replies. Status dropdown works correctly. Pinned replies should show amber background (not tested due to hover state limitations in automation).

accordion_behavior.only_one_expanded: Only 1 reply-input visible at a time
accordion_behavior.first_prompt_default: First prompt expands by default on page load

empty_state.message: Be the first to share your thoughts.

response_count.expanded_display: X Response(s) shown above replies list
